{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Naraka waypoints
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Naraka waypoints]] are controlled by [[Enosh Grandmasters]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
